creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: tabthorpe
Date: Mon Sep 30 03:16:24 2013
New Revision: 328764
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/328764

Log:
  - Update to 1.2.17
  
  PR:		ports/182229
  Submitted by:	Juraj Lutter <otis@sk.FreeBSD.org> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/games/powwow/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/games/powwow/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/games/powwow/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/games/powwow/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/powwow/Makefile	Mon Sep 30 00:29:03 2013	(r328763)
+++ head/games/powwow/Makefile	Mon Sep 30 03:16:24 2013	(r328764)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	powwow
-PORTVERSION=	1.2.14
+PORTVERSION=	1.2.17
 CATEGORIES=	games
 MASTER_SITES=	http://hoopajoo.net/static/projects/ \
 		ftp://ftp.wilbury.sk/pub/FreeBSD/local/distfiles/
@@ -22,6 +22,10 @@ pre-build:
 
 do-install:
 	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/powwow ${PREFIX}/bin
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/powwow-movieplay ${PREFIX}/bin
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/powwow-muc ${PREFIX}/bin
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/catrw ${PREFIX}/bin
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/follow ${PREFIX}/bin
 	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/powwow.6 ${PREFIX}/man/man6
 	${MKDIR} ${DATADIR}
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/powwow.doc ${DATADIR}

Modified: head/games/powwow/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/games/powwow/distinfo	Mon Sep 30 00:29:03 2013	(r328763)
+++ head/games/powwow/distinfo	Mon Sep 30 03:16:24 2013	(r328764)

+SHA256 (powwow-1.2.17.tar.gz) = e8dee1fe9cd6b59cfa20e3e7ef4eb49775b72b80d1d298e23172337cbc78baf6
+SIZE (powwow-1.2.17.tar.gz) = 308660

Modified: head/games/powwow/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/games/powwow/pkg-plist	Mon Sep 30 00:29:03 2013	(r328763)
+++ head/games/powwow/pkg-plist	Mon Sep 30 03:16:24 2013	(r328764)
@@ -1,4 +1,8 @@
+bin/catrw
+bin/follow
 bin/powwow
+bin/powwow-movieplay
+bin/powwow-muc
 %%DATADIR%%/powwow.doc
 %%DATADIR%%/powwow.help
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%
